name: King Plus Adult Cat Food – Fish 1.5kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural cat food with fish protein. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats.
description: King Plus Adult Cat Food – Fish , fully balanced all-natural cat food with fish protein. Carefully formulated by a cat nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ………… 28% Fat ……………. 10% Crude Ash ………….. 8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ………… 2.5% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Fish Meal, Fish Oil, Corn Gluten, Liver Aroma, Fish Aroma, Rice, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewers Yeast, Taurine. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (biotin) – B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Key Benefits High-Quality Fish Protein : Supports lean muscle maintenance and satisfies your cat’s natural carnivorous needs. Omega-3 & Omega-6 Fatty Acids : From fish oil and flaxseed, these promote healthy skin and a shiny coat. Taurine Enriched : Essential for heart health and optimal vision in cats. Digestive Health Support : Contains dietary fiber and brewer’s yeast to promote gut health and nutrient absorption. Balanced Minerals & Vitamins : Supports strong bones, immunity, and overall vitality.
